scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB "pnpm -C apps/api start:dev" "pnpm -C apps/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C apps/api build && pnpm -C apps/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C apps/api lint && pnpm -C apps/web lint
scripts.test: pnpm -C apps/api test && pnpm -C apps/web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C apps/api typecheck && pnpm -C apps/web typecheck
scripts.build:packages: pnpm -C packages/shared build && pnpm -C packages/scheduler build
scripts.dev:packages: concurrently -n SHARED,SCHED "pnpm -C packages/shared dev" "pnpm -C packages/scheduler dev"
